Fox Den Small Engine Repair

Utica & Rome, NY
Call/Text (315) 813-8109
Fast turnaround • Free pickup & delivery available

Fast, Affordable Small Engine Repair.

Serving Utica, Rome & the surrounding area. We fix, tune, and service the equipment that keeps your yard, driveway, and property moving.

Need help before the weekend? Get in touch for quick diagnostics, dependable repairs, and honest work from a local shop that understands busy schedules.

Call or Text (315) 813-8109 Request Service

Quick Turnaround

We work to get your equipment back in service fast.

Free Pickup & Delivery

Available on many repairs to save you a trip.

Friendly Local Service

Message, call, or text anytime.

Ready for the season

We tune it, test it, and get it working right.

From spring startup service to pre-winter snowblower prep, Fox Den keeps your gear dependable when you need it most.

Service Area

Utica • Rome • Nearby towns

Contact

(315) 813-8109

Fox Den promise

Straight answers, fair pricing, and work built for people who rely on their equipment every day.

Services

Repairs and tune-ups for the equipment you count on.

We fix, tune, and service equipment so it is ready for the season. Get mowers, trimmers, chainsaws, pressure washers, and blowers tuned and ready for spring and summer. Bring snowblowers in before the next snow season so you're not scrambling when the first storm hits.

🌿

Lawn Mowers

Blade, belt, carburetor, and startup issues handled with season-ready tune-ups.

🧵

Weed Eaters / String Trimmers

We fix hard starts, fuel problems, and weak running so trimming gets done right.

🪚

Chainsaws

From tune-ups to troubleshooting, we help your saw cut clean and start reliably.

💦

Pressure Washers

We get pressure washers ready for home jobs, cleanup work, and heavy use.

🍂

Leaf Blowers

Tune-ups and repairs for blowers that need strong, dependable performance.

❄️

Snowblowers

Get snowblowers serviced before the next snow season so they are ready to go.

🏁

Go-Karts

Repair help for family fun and weekend machines that need a little extra attention.

🏍️

Dirt Bikes

We help diagnose and service dirt bikes that need to be running right again.

🛠️

Other Yard Toys

If it has a small engine and needs attention, reach out and ask. We like a challenge.

Fast turnaround times

Affordable rates

Free pickup & delivery available

Message, call, or text

How it works

A simple process that gets your gear back to work.

1

Message, call or text us

Tell us what you have, what it is doing, and how we can reach you.

2

We pick up or you drop off

Free pickup & delivery is available, or bring it by if that is easier.

3

We fix & tune it

We diagnose the problem, make the repair, and tune it to run better.

4

Fast turnaround, back ready to run

We keep the process moving so you can get back to the job, property, or trail.

Shop updates

Recent listings or notes from the shop.

If the connected sheet includes current items, repairs, or notes, they will appear below. This keeps the page easy to update without editing the site itself.

Contact

Request Service

Tell us what you have, what it is doing, and how you want to be reached. We’ll do our best to get you taken care of quickly.

We’ll review your request and get back as soon as we can.

Call or text anytime

(315) 813-8109

If it is easier, just call or text and tell us what you need. We’re set up for quick, local communication.

Good to include in your message

  • Equipment type and make/model if available
  • What it is doing and when the problem started
  • Whether you need pickup/delivery or will drop off
  • Your city or neighborhood so we can plan service
